About
Creative strategist with European roots, building brands in Melbourne.

Originally from Spain, with Italian and Cuban roots, I relocated to Australia nearly three years ago. With 5+ years across fashion, design, real estate and hospitality, I build strong brand narratives through multi-channel campaigns — combining content, PR and digital to drive engagement and meaningful growth.

I've worked across agency, in-house and freelance environments, bringing strategic thinking and hands-on execution to every project.

I'm Arianna — a creative and strategic marketing professional who genuinely loves what she does. I love brands, I love people, and I love the magic that happens when you bring both together with intention and craft.

Whether it's a campaign, a brand identity, a content strategy or just a great conversation about ideas — I'm always up for creating something meaningful. Let's talk.
